working_on: Bake SWE-hardening rollout (Issues #65–#86) into engine/STATE.md as a phased adoption plan with dependency graph and trigger surface so future sessions can pick the next eligible item with full context. declared_scope: Single-deliverable session: append SWE-hardening rollout section to engine/STATE.md and add SWE-hardening rollout candidate to S-0124+ candidates list. The rollout indexes 22 GitHub Issues (#65–#86) filed at session-pre-S-0124 from the audit plan at ~/.claude/plans/not-a-working-session-sequential-twilight.md, organized into Tier 1 foundations (#65 #66 #68 #69 #67), Tier 2 judgment+observability (#70 #71 #72 #73 #74 #75-priority-urgent), Tier 3 composition+release+trigger-gated (#76 #77 #78 #80 #79 #82 #83 #84), and analysis-outcome additions (#81 #86 #85). Section adds explicit dependency table per tier, trigger-gated re-surface table tying Phase 6/9/collaborator-count milestones to specific Issues, and explicit non-adoptions table recording 9 confirmed-skip decisions from the ECC and addyosmani audits. Adoption discipline (ADR + MemPalace decision drawer + first-exercise readiness note + verification + posture-interaction reasoning) is baked into each Issue body so the future session opening any of them inherits everything needed to execute cold. No code changes, no migrations, no ADRs authored in this session — each Tier 1+ Issue is its own ADR-tracked downstream session.
